description_long: This is a compact wooden nightstand or side table with a rectangular shape and a single pull-out drawer. The wood grain is visible throughout, with a reddish-brown finish and lighter, almost peach-toned highlights on the drawer front and tabletop. The drawer features a central, diamond-shaped knob, likely made of a different material, possibly ceramic or metal. Below the drawer, there is an open shelf for additional storage, supported by four sturdy legs. The overall design is simple and functional, with clean lines and a modern aesthetic. This piece would be suitable for use in urban environments such as apartments, hotel rooms, or office lounges.
description: A small, rectangular wooden nightstand with a single drawer, open shelf, and a central knob. The finish is reddish-brown with lighter highlights and a modern, clean-lined design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the closed drawer, central knob, and open shelf below.
description_view_1: Side view with the drawer partially open, revealing the interior compartment.
description_view_2: Front view with the drawer fully open, clearly displaying the knob and drawer space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the drawer extended, showing the side profile and open shelf.
